_doc: Section-to-Canvas-URL map for IS2053. Used by the Fall multi-section JS (deferred until August 2026) to rewrite Canvas assignment links based on ?section=XXX query parameter. For Summer 2026 (one section, no JS yet), this file is just a skeleton holding the canonical URL.

_schema.sections[].code: Short section identifier as it appears in Canvas (e.g., '001', '901')
_schema.sections[].label: Human-readable label for the section picker (e.g., 'Summer 2026 ON1')
_schema.sections[].helloWorldUrl: Full Canvas URL to the Hello World assignment for this section. Replace the '#' once Canvas is set up.

_links.hello-world-canvas-link: DOM id on the Launch Hello World CTA button (in start-here.html CP9 Step 3 and hello-world.html). The Fall JS will querySelector this id and rewrite the href based on the matched section.
_links.fallJsTodo: When Fall sections are known: (1) populate sections[] with real section codes and Canvas URLs, (2) add /js/sections.js that reads ?section=XXX, fetches this file, and rewrites the link href. (3) Reference js/sections.js in start-here.html and hello-world.html.
